title: forsythia × densiflora
intro: Forsythia × densiflora, also known as the dwarf forsythia or Korean forsythia, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the family Oleaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Forsythia × densiflora is typically prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used as a dried extract or powder in various herbal preparations.
